hero.subtitle: Labhansh.ai empowers every farmer with data-driven crop recommendations, disease detection, and market insights — making precision agriculture accessible to all.

features.subtitle: Every tool designed to maximise your harvest, reduce losses, and increase profitability.

items.title: Crop Recommendation
items.desc: AI-powered suggestions based on soil type, climate, and local conditions.

items.title: Crop Yield Prediction
items.desc: Forecast harvest output with high accuracy using real-time data.

items.title: Plant Disease Detection
items.desc: Upload a crop photo — AI instantly identifies diseases with treatment advice.

items.title: Fertilizer Guide
items.desc: Personalized fertilizer recommendations to optimize soil health.

items.title: Market Price Tracking
items.desc: Live mandi prices and trends so you sell at the best price.

items.title: Profit Analyzer
items.desc: Calculate and optimize your farming profits with detailed cost-benefit analysis.

items.title: Government Schemes
items.desc: Access information about government subsidies, loans, and farming schemes.

items.title: Farmer Communities
items.desc: Connect with fellow farmers, share experiences, and learn from the community.

items.title: AI Farming Assistant
items.desc: 24/7 AI chatbot answering all farming questions in Hindi and English.

how.subtitle: From data to decision in four intelligent steps — making farming smarter for everyone.

steps.title: Enter Farm Details
steps.desc: Input field location, soil type, crop history and available resources.

steps.title: AI Data Analysis
steps.desc: AI models analyze soil, weather, satellite data, and market trends in real time.

steps.title: Smart Recommendations
steps.desc: Receive personalized crop, fertilizer, and pesticide recommendations instantly.

steps.title: Grow & Profit
steps.desc: Implement insights, track progress, and watch your yields grow each season.

why.subtitle: We don't just provide data — we transform how farmers think, decide, and grow.

center.title: India's Most Trusted Agri-AI Platform
center.subtitle: Built by agriculturalists, data scientists, and farmers — for farmers across India

benefits.title: Hyper-Accurate AI
benefits.desc: Models trained on 10M+ Indian farm data points for 92%+ prediction accuracy.

benefits.title: Works on Any Phone
benefits.desc: Low-bandwidth design so rural farmers can access all features offline too.

benefits.title: Early Disease Alerts
benefits.desc: Detect crop diseases 2–3 weeks before visible symptoms.

benefits.title: Higher Market Returns
benefits.desc: Market intelligence helps farmers sell at peak prices, boosting income 20–35%.

about.subtitle: We combine satellite imagery, IoT sensors, weather data, and machine learning to deliver actionable insights — improving productivity, profitability, and sustainability.

card.title: Bridging Technology & Agriculture
card.desc: Labhansh.ai was born from a simple belief: every farmer deserves access to precision intelligence — regardless of farm size or location.

cta.subtitle: Create your free account today and start getting AI-powered insights for your farm. No credit card required.
cta.note: Free forever for small farmers · No credit card · Available in Hindi

footer.desc: Transforming Indian agriculture with the power of artificial intelligence. Smarter farming, better harvests, greater profits.

modal.welcome: Welcome back! Sign in to your account
